rag_rules: Preserve the original AADL architecture when inserting AGREE annex blocks
Place component type annexes in valid component type scopes
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes after subcomponents and connections
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables or outputs
generic_rules: Maintain the authoritative source of component structure from the input AADL model
Ensure inserted annex blocks do not introduce new component names, ports, or connections
Preserve the original AADL property associations and their values
Do not modify the existing AADL model structure during fusion
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks for AGREE contracts
Place assumptions and guarantees in valid component type scopes
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes
anti_patterns: Do not introduce new component names, ports, or connections during fusion
Do not modify the existing AADL model structure
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables or outputs
